name: Shraddha Kapoor
description: Shraddha Kapoor is an Indian actress and singer born on March 3, 1987, in Mumbai, India. She comes from a Bollywood background, as her father is actor Shakti Kapoor. Shraddha made her acting debut in 2010 with the film "Teen Patti" but gained widespread recognition with her role in the romantic drama "Aashiqui 2" (2013). Since then, she has appeared in a variety of successful films, including "Ek Villain" (2014), "ABCD 2" (2015), and "Stree" (2018). Apart from acting, Shraddha has showcased her singing talent in some of her films. Known for her versatility and charm, she has established herself as one of the leading actresses in the Indian film industry.
creator: adeepdick
